metadata.name: Perform AML Check on New Client

description: As part of onboarding, a new client must be checked against AML and sanctions watchlists.

nodes.task_description: Take the new client's name and date of birth.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately captures the client's identifying information.

nodes.task_description: Run the client's details through the AML screening tool.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully runs the check against global watchlists.

nodes.task_description: Review the results for any potential matches and clear any false positives.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews the results, finds no true matches, and marks the check as complete.
